---
title: "Quiz 5 — Interactions & Simple Slopes"
---

These questions check **interactions** — when the effect of one predictor *depends on*
another, as in $\hat{y} = b_0 + b_1 x + b_2 z + b_3 xz$ — and the **simple slopes** you
read off for each group. Several items refer to a shared faculty-salary coefficient
table shown with the questions. They mirror **Homework 5** and draw on **Chapters 4–5**
of the Lecture Notes.

Answer each question and press **Check** for instant, explained feedback. Your score
and progress are saved in this browser; press **Reset quiz** to start over.

```{=html}
<div class="quizbank" data-bank="../assets/banks/quiz5.json" data-show-title="false"></div>
<script type="module" src="../assets/quiz-engine.js"></script>
```
